title: Severe Drought — Horn of Africa
desc: Rainfall deficit exceeding 60% across Somalia, Ethiopia and northern Kenya. SPI index at -2.1, worst in 40 years.

title: IPC Phase 4 Alert — Sudan
desc: 6.1M people facing emergency food insecurity in North Darfur and Kordofan regions. Conflict and displacement remain primary drivers.

title: Famine Risk — Gaza Strip
desc: 2.1M face catastrophic food insecurity (IPC Phase 5). Complete breakdown of food systems. Immediate humanitarian access required.

title: Groundwater Depletion — North Africa
desc: GRACE-FO detects accelerating groundwater decline: -3.8 cm/yr in Libya, -2.9 cm/yr in Egypt Nile Delta. Aquifer stress levels critical.

title: Crop Failure Risk — South Asia Wheat Belt
desc: NDVI anomaly -0.21 across 3.1M ha. Soil moisture below 18% (SMAP). Heat stress +4C above normal. Yield loss 25-40% projected.

title: Reservoir Critical — Lake Kariba at 31%
desc: Lake Kariba at 31% capacity following 3rd consecutive below-normal rainy season. Hydroelectric generation reduced 45%. Irrigation restricted.

title: Flash Flood Risk — Bangladesh & Myanmar
desc: Pre-monsoon heavy rainfall detected. 1.8M people in low-lying areas at risk. River gauges showing 180% of normal discharge.

title: Locust Breeding — Sahel Region
desc: Desert locust breeding confirmed in Mali, Niger and Burkina Faso. Early infestation affecting 520,000 ha of cropland. Swarm formation expected in 10 days.

title: Nile Basin Dispute — Water Levels at 35-Year Low
desc: Blue Nile flow at lowest level since 1991. GERD filling exacerbates downstream water stress. Egypt agricultural output threatened.

title: Planting Window Advisory — West Africa
desc: Optimal sorghum and millet planting window opens in 14 days across the Sahel. Soil moisture conditions favourable following early rains.
